name: E-1 severity override: when extends chain disagrees about a rule, the rightmost (most-recent) extends source wins per §2.5 extends_rightmost
command:
printf 'rules:
  g-ts-001: warn
' > base.yaml && printf 'extends:
  - ./base.yaml
rules:
  g-ts-001: error
' > p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --explain g-ts-001 --profile p.yaml 2>err.txt; grep -q 'effective_severity=error' err.txt && grep -q 'source=p.yaml' err.txt && echo rightmost_wins 1>&2
